

Yes! I KNOW we haven't created a campaign yet. 

But we need to tell Youtube what to aim for with that campaign ...which is why we need to define our conversion goals first.

This involves cutting AND pasting ...so try to stay hydrated lol.

And if you haven't set up your Google Tag Manager account and your Google Analytics account yet - do that first!

Here's Doron from my team walking you through it. A little over 9 minutes to set up *both*.
https://www.loom.com/share/f0cffaea718e463784538a36506914c5

I mean - that's twice as much cutting and pasting ...but still ...we're really just cutting and pasting here.
